bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.50% of the withdrawn amount or Rs.500 whichever is higher
bank_defaults.cash_interest: Cash withdrawal transactions carry finance charge from the date of transaction till the date of full payment, at the applicable finance charge rate (Eterna, Tiara: 3.25% per month i.e. 39% per annum; All other Credit Cards: 3.75% per month i.e. 45% per annum). No interest-free period applies to cash advances.
bank_defaults.source_section: TARIFF OF CHARGES: Finance Charges (Eterna, Tiara: 3.25% per month i.e. 39% per annum; All other Credit Cards: 3.75% per month i.e. 45% per annum), Cash Withdrawal Charges, Foreign Currency Transaction Fee, Late Payment Charges (Statement Balance / Charges table), and Interest Free Period 20 to 50 Days rows
